name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
labels: enhancement

## Summary

A brief description of the feature.

## Motivation

Why is this useful? What problem does it solve?

## Proposed API / Behavior

```zig
// sketch of the proposed API or behavior
```

## RFC Reference

If this relates to an RFC requirement, cite the section (e.g. RFC 9204 §3.2.4).

## Alternatives Considered

Any alternative approaches you considered and why you prefer this one.
